backfill_note: History captured by backfill is anchored as of anchor time; capture-time metrics (ledger_span_days, active_days, sessions_total) reflect when rows were appended, not when the underlying work happened.

metrics.caveat: Local wall-clock time after the first successful OTS calendar response; self-attested, not the independently verified Bitcoin block time.
metrics.name: anchor_latency_distribution

metrics.caveat: Percentages cover only ledger rows named by supplied anchor events; unanchored local rows are excluded.
metrics.name: evidence_provenance_split
